checks.label: .env.local available
checks.evidence: .env.local exists. Secret values were not printed.

checks.label: Appwrite provisioning environment
checks.evidence: VITE_APPWRITE_ENDPOINT, VITE_APPWRITE_PROJECT_ID, and APPWRITE_API_KEY are present. Secret values were not printed.

checks.label: Appwrite schema validation
checks.evidence: 20 collections, 247 attributes, and 70 indexes validate locally.

checks.label: Payment/package and waiver gate contracts
checks.evidence: 6 payment/package tracks and 6 waiver tracks keep checkout and signatures disabled until approvals are complete.

checks.label: Public claim safety contract
checks.evidence: 7 claim-safety tracks keep league, facility, roster, sponsor, fixture, outcome, and launch claims approval-gated.

checks.label: Promotion cutover contract
checks.evidence: 9 cutover tracks keep root promotion, redirects, backend intake, payments, legal/support, proof content, and rollback approval-gated.

checks.label: Safeguarding and data privacy contract
checks.evidence: 8 safeguarding tracks keep minor consent, staff verification, medical data, media releases, retention, and audit enforcement approval-gated.

checks.label: detroitDynamoLeadIntake Appwrite config
checks.evidence: Function is public lead intake, enabled, points to the scaffold path, and includes database/document scopes.

checks.label: detroitDynamoLeadPipelineAction Appwrite config
checks.evidence: Function is authenticated pipeline action, enabled, points to the scaffold path, and includes database/document scopes.

checks.label: detroitDynamoAdminModuleRead Appwrite config
checks.evidence: Function is authenticated admin module read, enabled, points to the scaffold path, and includes database/document scopes.

checks.label: detroitDynamoAdminRoleGrantAction Appwrite config
checks.evidence: Function is authenticated admin role grant action, enabled, points to the scaffold path, and includes database/document scopes.

checks.label: detroitDynamoAdminModuleWriteAction Appwrite config
checks.evidence: Function is authenticated admin module write action, enabled, points to the scaffold path, and includes database/document scopes.

checks.label: detroitDynamoLeadIntake scaffold
checks.evidence: Function package and source validate the public lead payload and write contact, tryout, sponsor, player, guardian, booking, and pipeline fields to the expected dd_* collections.

checks.label: detroitDynamoLeadIntake public payload contract
checks.evidence: 7 success fixtures and 4 rejection fixtures validate against public form variants, routing collections, and required field guardrails.

checks.label: detroitDynamoLeadPipelineAction scaffold
checks.evidence: Function package and source validate authenticated pipeline transitions, update pipeline fields on expected dd_* records, and append audit events.

checks.label: detroitDynamoLeadPipelineAction handoff contract
checks.evidence: 6 success fixtures and 3 rejection fixtures validate against supported dd_* collections, admin roles, allowed pipeline transitions, and audit event writes.

checks.label: detroitDynamoAdminModuleRead scaffold
checks.evidence: Function package and source validate authenticated module reads, role access, collection scoping, pagination limit, and Appwrite document reads.

checks.label: detroitDynamoAdminModuleRead handoff contract
checks.evidence: 6 success fixtures and 5 rejection fixtures validate against protected modules, scoped dd_* collections, and admin role view access.

checks.label: detroitDynamoAdminRoleGrantAction scaffold
checks.evidence: Function package and source validate authenticated Master Admin role grants, bootstrap the first Master Admin only by server env, mutate trusted role assignments, and append audit events.

checks.label: detroitDynamoAdminRoleGrantAction handoff contract
checks.evidence: 6 success fixtures and 6 rejection fixtures validate against Master Admin gating, first-admin bootstrap, self-lockout protection, trusted assignment writes, and audit event writes.

checks.label: detroitDynamoAdminModuleWriteAction scaffold
checks.evidence: Function package and source validate authenticated module writes, trusted role grants, module action guards, collection scoping, external gates, document mutations, and audit events.

checks.label: detroitDynamoAdminModuleWriteAction handoff contract
checks.evidence: 6 success fixtures and 7 rejection fixtures validate against protected modules, action guards, scoped collections, trusted role grants, external gates, and audit event writes.

checks.label: Function variable configuration path
checks.evidence: scripts/configure-functions.mjs includes Detroit Dynamo function APPWRITE_API_KEY mappings.

checks.label: Live backend verification
checks.evidence: No Appwrite network calls were made. This keeps the preflight safe for local preview and CI without credentials.
checks.nextAction: After replacing/confirming credentials, run npm run provision:dynamo-appwrite -- --apply, configure function variables, deploy Detroit Dynamo functions, bootstrap or grant Master Admin access, submit production-preview forms, test an authenticated pipeline transition, then test an authenticated admin module read.
